headline: Claude AI Says Zeta Global (ZETA) Is a Better Buy Than Microsoft (MSFT)
summary: Zeta Global Holdings (NASDAQ:ZETA) is one of the top picks of Claude AI. According to “The Claude Portfolio” account on X, which is associated with Autopilot, a fintech investment platform, the AI chatbot swapped MSFT for Zeta earlier this year, citing strong revenue growth and increasing usage of the omnichannel data-driven cloud platform company. headline: Predicition: Palantir Defies Doubters. Here’s Our New Price Target
summary: Palantir bears have called the stock overvalued at every step, yet the company keeps silencing them with results that strain credibility. After eight straight earnings beats and a dramatic guidance raise, our model lands on a price target that may surprise both sides of the debate.

headline: Archer Aviation Flies 14% Higher as Anduril Team-Up Unveils Autonomous VTOL; Joby and EHang Get a Lift, Too
summary: Archer Aviation just partnered with a secretive defense tech firm to unveil an autonomous attack aircraft, and the market reacted fast. But with the stock still deep in the red for the year and Thunder's first flight years away, the harder question is whether Monday's surge signals a real turning point or just noise.
